heading: United States Code Annotated or United States Code Service; procurement for Senators
label: 6316 United States Code Annotated or United States Code Service; procurement for Senators
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 55 of this title
Amendments1972— substituted “United States Code Service” for “Federal Code Annotated” in two places.Pub. L. 92–607
amendments: Amendments1972— substituted “United States Code Service” for “Federal Code Annotated” in two places.Pub. L. 92–607

children.text: one copy of each of the volumes of the United States Code Annotated being published at the time the Senator takes office, and, as long as that Senator holds office, one copy of each replacement volume, each annual pocket part, and each pamphlet supplementing each such pocket part to the United States Code Annotated; or

one copy of each of the volumes of the United States Code Service being published at the time the Senator takes office, and, as long as that Senator holds office, one copy of each replacement volume and each pocket supplement to the United States Code Service.
